issues.title: Damage spike on floor 9 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 12 damage when player had 12 HP (100.0% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Reach floor 9, encounter 2
Observe enemy turn 3 damage

issues.title: Damage spike on floor 9 encounter 2
issues.description: Enemy dealt 12 damage when player had 12 HP (100.0% of current HP). This exceeds the 50% threshold.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Reach floor 9, encounter 2
Observe enemy turn 4 damage

issues.title: 3 consecutive easy encounters starting floor 1
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP (>72/80) across 3 consecutive encounters (floors 1-1). HP values: 80, 80, 80.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Play through floors 1-1
Observe lack of meaningful HP pressure

issues.title: 4 consecutive easy encounters starting floor 1
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP (>72/80) across 4 consecutive encounters (floors 1-2). HP values: 80, 80, 80, 80.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Play through floors 1-2
Observe lack of meaningful HP pressure

issues.title: 5 consecutive easy encounters starting floor 1
issues.description: Player maintained >90% HP (>72/80) across 5 consecutive encounters (floors 1-2). HP values: 80, 80, 80, 80, 78.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Play through floors 1-2
Observe lack of meaningful HP pressure

issues.title: Insufficient healing after floor 3
issues.description: Player's maximum HP after floor 3 was 47, never reaching the 60% threshold of 48. This suggests healing mechanics are insufficient for sustain in mid-to-late game.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Progress past floor 3
Monitor HP recovery throughout remaining floors

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 2 encounter 2
issues.description: Encounter against crystal_guardian took 4 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 1.7 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Progress to floor 2
Encounter crystal_guardian at encounter 2
Observe increased turn count

issues.title: Difficulty spike on floor 5 encounter 2
issues.description: Encounter against stone_sentinel took 7 turns to resolve, more than 2x the previous floor's average of 2.7 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty increase.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Progress to floor 5
Encounter stone_sentinel at encounter 2
Observe increased turn count

issues.title: Card type "wild" never played
issues.description: The "wild" card type was never used during this playthrough. This may indicate the card type is unavailable, underpowered, or the player's deck/archetype doesn't include it.
reproductionSteps: Start run with seed 42, profile speed-runner
Monitor card type distribution during run
Check if "wild" cards appear in deck
